overview.short: Nandangarh stupa is an ancient colossal stupa located near the town of Lauria Nandangarh in West Champaran district of Bihar in India.

topPlaces.name: Lauria Nandangarh
topPlaces.description: Lauria Nandangarh, also Lauriya Navandgarh, is a city or town about 14 km from Narkatiaganj (or Shikarpur) and 28 km from Bettiah in West Champaran district of Bihar state in northern India. It is situated near the banks of the Burhi Gandak River.

topPlaces.name: Kehunia
topPlaces.description: Kehunia is a village about 10 km from Narkatiaganj and 40 km from Bettiah in the West Champaran district of Bihar state in northern India.

topPlaces.name: Macchargawan
topPlaces.description: Machhargawan is a panchayat in Bairia block in West Champaran district in Bihar, India. The pin code of Machhargawan is 845452.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Nandangarh Stupa and Rampart?
faq.a: The best time to visit Nandangarh Stupa and Rampart is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Nandangarh Stupa and Rampart?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Jay Prakash Narayan Airport, Patna (170 km) and the nearest railway station is Gorakhpur Junction (104 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Nandangarh Stupa and Rampart?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Nandangarh Stupa and Rampart at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Nandangarh Stupa and Rampart?
faq.a: Stays in Nandangarh Stupa and Rampart start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Nandangarh Stupa and Rampart?
faq.a: The top attractions are Lauria Nandangarh, Kehunia, Macchargawan.
